name: com.liyu.psd2prefab
description: Convert Photoshop PSD files into UGUI prefabs. Pure C# PSD parser (no Photoshop required): slices layers into sprites, rebuilds group hierarchy and positions, converts text layers to Text/TextMeshPro, and auto-adds Button to btn_ layers.

samples.description: A test PSD with nested groups, unicode layer names and btn_ naming.
